welcomeSub: To build your custom algorithm, we first need to understand your training background.
absBeginnerDesc: I have never lifted weights or don't know my baseline maxes. Put me on a safe machine-based track to calibrate my strength.
expLifterDesc: I have experience with free weights and know my heavy loads. Let me input my baselines or swap movements.
dangerDesc: Irreversibly delete all local baseline data, training logs, and settings.
prBoardDesc: Your estimated 1-Rep Max progression across all tracked movements. These metrics inform the hyper-optimized loads generated by the AI engine.
selectExercise: Select an exercise you did recently
selectExerciseDesc: Tap on any machine exercise below to log your recent performance. Don't worry about baselines or 1RMs; we do the math for you in the background!
dbEmpty: Database is currently empty. Go to the 'Baselines' tab or complete a workout week to write structured trainer data logs.
pasteJsonDesc: Paste any scientific trainer output JSON below to sync it to the application layout:
syncJsonBtn: Sync Pasted JSON to Local DB
trainerConsoleDesc: Core AI Engine & Scientific expert response simulator
chatPlaceholder: Type questions or instructions for your scientific trainer...
successToast: Great job! We've saved this to build your custom plan for next week.
chatInitialMessage:
### Platinum Personal Trainer Initialized 🤖🏆

Hello **Amir**! I am your scientific Personal Trainer, powered by RP Hypertrophy and JuggernautAI principles. 

I will help you autoregulate your workouts, target progressive overload, and structure your custom meals (keeping your strict dislikes of oatmeal and kashk in mind!).

To get started, update your baseline metrics in the **Baseline & Onboarding** tab and initialize your Mesocycle!
nutritionDesc: Amir, we have configured your food preferences, strict ingredient exclusions, and daily timing triggers.
strictExclusionsDesc: Absolutely NO oatmeal and NO kashk under any circumstance.
breakfast1: 1. Sangak or Barbari flatbread with Tabriz cheese and a honey drizzle.
breakfast2: 2. Low-oil tomato omelet (stewed in natural juice, finished with a quick touch of oil).
premiumShakeDesc: Whey protein powder + frozen banana slices (for an ice-cream-like density) + calculated peanut butter.
beverage1: - Skim-milk espresso lattes finished with a velvety, thick microfoam.
beverage2: - Diced sweet mangoes, enjoyed slowly using a small fork.
noActiveMesocycleDesc: Go to the **Baselines** tab first to set up your strength limits and initialize your Week 1 training plan.
completeSetsDesc: Complete your sets for each exercise and indicate how close you were to failure using the simplified exertion mappings. We will adjust next week's volume automatically.
aiGeneratingPlan: AI Coach is formulating your training block...
aiGenerationError: Failed to formulate plan. Please check your API key or internet connection.
